title: aralia subcordata
intro: Aralia subcordata, also known as the Chinese angelica tree or Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Araliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aralia subcordata include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Aralia subcordata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
